stimulus.content: Africa is the second-largest continent. Its physical features include the Sahara Desert in the north, tropical rainforests near the equator, and the Great Rift Valley in the east. Africa is also home to more than 50 countries and hundreds of languages.

stem: Based on the passage, what makes Africa a diverse continent in terms of geography?

choices.text: It has deserts, rainforests, and rift valleys
It is completely covered by tropical rainforest
It has only one type of climate across the land
It is the smallest continent with few countries

answer_explanation: Africa has a wide variety of physical features, including the Sahara Desert, tropical rainforests, and the Great Rift Valley, making it geographically diverse.
